📸 Screenshot the card below at 1200×630, save as public/og-image.png, then upload to GitHub → Repo → Settings → Social preview.
Recommended tools: macOS Cmd+Shift+4, or Shottr / shottr.

● Live demo Dual-Licensed AGPL v3 + Commercial

🌳 Stemmagraph

Build, visualize, and share beautiful family trees.
Interactive, free, and open-source — forever.

⚛️ React 19 ⚡ Vite 8 🌊 React Flow 🔷 TypeScript
